caption: 65 inverters. 9.4 years of data. €176,956 in avoidable losses hiding in plain sight.
Plant-level KPIs look fine — but inverter-level losses are invisible until now.
The heatmap surfaces every underperforming unit. Red = where money is leaking.
Fix First ranking: inverters sorted by avoidable loss, curtailment already stripped out.
Early-warning system: SolarMind flags problems 92 days before a service ticket is raised.
Drilling into the worst inverter: INV 01.07.045.
SolarMind would have flagged the −6.8 pp deviation in July 2020 — 3 months before the ticket.
Degradation trend vs own healthy early-life baseline — nine years of slow decline, now visible.
Fault codes + open service ticket confirm the root cause: Strangausfall, open 1,736 days.
Annual loss attribution: technical loss vs curtailment vs weather-uncertain, year by year.
SolarMind: surface it, price it, prove it's not curtailment, act on it.
